changes.motivation: Update the panfactum (pf) image to the latest build commit hash 7b4fe367.

problems: No documentation or README explains where to update the PF image tag — the agent had to search across multiple files (flake.nix, demo_cicd/main.tf, kube_constants outputs) before locating the single authoritative location in `packages/infrastructure/kube_constants/main.tf`. A note in TOC.md or a top-level comment in that file would prevent this discovery overhead.
